name: auto-glass-repair-marketing-kit
description: Compliance-safe marketing for auto glass repair and replacement shops — AGSC/AGRSS installation standards gate, ADAS recalibration disclosure, Nevada NRS 686A.2825 deductible waiver fraud block, OEM vs. aftermarket FMVSS 205 truth-in-advertising, FTC 2023 endorsements
compliance: AGSC Standard 150 — Auto Glass Safety Council Installation & Safe Drive-Away Standards
AGRSS — Auto Glass Replacement Safety Standard (predecessor to AGSC Standard 150)
FMVSS 212/208 — Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard for Windshield Retention & Occupant Protection
FMVSS 205 — Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard for Glazing Materials (OEM vs. Aftermarket)
Nevada NRS 686A.2825 — Prohibition on Insurance Deductible Waiver (active DOI enforcement)
Nevada NRS 686A.220 — Insurance Anti-Steering / Preferred Shop Prohibition
Nevada NRS 624 — State Contractors Board Licensing (NSCB C-8 Glass & Glazing)
Nevada NRS 598.0923 / 598.0915 — Deceptive Trade Practices Act
FTC Act Section 5 — Unfair or Deceptive Acts or Practices (OEM claims, safety claims)
FTC 16 CFR Part 255 (2023) — Endorsement Guides (review acquisition, testimonials)
TCPA — Telephone Consumer Protection Act (SMS opt-out requirements)
RESPA Section 8 — Anti-Kickback (dealer referral arrangement structure guidance)
author: max_0x1
